challenge.title: Korak 25
challenge.description: Sada, nakon što ste dobro razumeli kako se dobija medijana za liste brojeva sa parnim brojem elemenata, možete ukloniti sav svoj test kod iz prethodnih koraka.

challengeFiles.name: index
challengeFiles.contents:
Statistics Calculator

Enter a list of comma-separated numbers.

The mean of a list of numbers is the average, calculated by taking the sum of all numbers and dividing that by the count of numbers.

Mean:

The median of a list of numbers is the number that appears in the middle of the list, when sorted from least to greatest.

Median:

The mode of a list of numbers is the number that appears most often in the list.

Mode:

The range of a list of numbers is the difference between the largest and smallest numbers in the list.

Range:

The variance of a list of numbers measures how far the values are from the mean, on average.

Variance:

The standard deviation of a list of numbers is the square root of the variance.

Standard Deviation:

challengeFiles.name: styles
script

tests.text: Trebalo bi da ne imaš const testArr1 = [1, 2, 3, 4, 5]; u svom kodu.
Ne bi trebalo da imaš const testArr2 = [1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6]; u svom kodu.
Ne bi trebalo da imaš const isEven = testArr2.length % 2 === 0; u svom kodu.
Ne bi trebalo da imaš console.log(isEven); u svom kodu.
Ne bi trebalo da imaš const oddListMedian = testArr1[Math.floor(testArr1.length / 2)]; u svom kodu.
Vi ne smete imati console.log(oddListMedian); u vašem kodu.
Ne bi trebalo da imaš const evenListMedian = getMean([testArr2[testArr2.length / 2 - 1], testArr2[testArr2.length / 2]]); u svom kodu.
